title: Christmas Xmas 3pcs Kids Childrens Micro Dinner Lunch Santa Festive Tableware Set Plate, Bowl & Cup, BPA Free
features: ❅ MEALS ARE FUN IN THE FESTIVE SEASON: Our Christmas dining set have kids favourite Santa character printed on them which makes Xmas meals fascinating and fun. The print will encourage your little ones more to eat on their own.

❅ COMPREHENSIVE SET FOR ANY MEAL: This fascinating Xmas dinner set includes decent size plate bowl and tumbler. Be it Christmas breakfast, lunch or dinner, our dining set has everything your little one needs to enjoy their Christmas meal!

❅ 100% SAFE AND ENVIRONMENT FRIENDLY: This dinnerware set is certified food safe (US/EU) and 100% BPA, harmful toxins and chemicals free. It's also 100% Recyclable which means you can throw it away without guilt when you no longer need it.

❅ DURABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT: Our dinner set is made from high quality and eco-friendly material which can last for many years. Not only it is safe but also strong and can easily bear daily rough handling by kids.
❅ GREAT CHRISTMAS GIFT: This children's breakfast and dinner set features a fun print, making it a great gift idea for Xmas for kids.
description: Christmas Xmas 3pcs Kids Childrens Microwaveable Breakfast Dinner Lunch Santa Festive Tableware Set Plate, Bowl & Cup, BPA Free
